message:
Fix tour tooltip positioning to stay within viewport

- Increase TOOLTIP_HEIGHT from 220 to 300 to account for full content
- Add flip logic to top placement when insufficient space above
- Improve bottom placement with fallback when neither direction fits
- Add 20px buffer for left/right placements to handle CSS transforms
- Update default case with consistent flip logic

Previously tooltips for steps targeting bottom-right elements (AI Missions,
Add Card, Templates) would render partially outside the viewport, making
navigation buttons inaccessible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
